identity.name: WiseDrive CRM
identity.mission: A high-density, modern CRM for 2026 that prioritizes data visibility and workflow efficiency.

rules: Headings (H1-H3): Use 'Outfit' with tight tracking (-0.02em). Font weight 600 or 700.
Body Text: Use 'Inter'. Base size 14px or 15px for data density.
Data/IDs: Use 'JetBrains Mono' for any ID, license plate, or code.
Labels: Uppercase, text-xs, tracking-wider, font-semibold, text-muted-foreground.

usage_rules: NO GRADIENTS for text or backgrounds. Use solid, confident colors.
Use 'muted' backgrounds (slate-50/100) for table headers to differentiate from data.
Primary color is ONLY for primary actions (Add Lead, Save). Secondary actions use outline or ghost variants.

structure: Main Links (Center-Left): Dashboard, Leads, Customers, Inspections, Admin
navigation.style: Sticky top-0 z-50. Glassmorphism (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md). Border-b border-slate-200.

container.strategy: Use 95% of screen width for data tables. Do not center-constrain tables to 1000px.

dashboard_grid.rules: Widgets must stretch to fill height. No jagged bottoms.

instructions: Remove vertical borders. Only use horizontal borders (border-b).
Header: bg-slate-50/50, text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-medium text-slate-500.
Cell Padding: p-3 (compact) to fit more columns.
Actions: Use a '...' dropdown menu for row actions to save space.

buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium text-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 text-slate-700 shadow-sm rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium text-sm

universal_guidelines: NO SIDEBAR. Use the top navigation bar for all main routes.
Data Density is King: Avoid excessive padding in tables. Users need to see rows.
All interactive elements MUST have a 'data-testid'.
Do not use 'Inter' for Headings. Use 'Outfit'.
Do not use gradients for text.
Ensure all text has at least 4.5:1 contrast ratio.
